RouteExtensionMethodsHandleGet Method (IMethodRoute, IResponseBuilderSelector, Type)

One Identity Manager API Server
Defines a generic GET handler for an HTTP request.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IMethodVerb HandleGet(
	this IMethodRoute route,
	IResponseBuilderSelector selector,
	Type defaultResultType = null
)

Parameters

route
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManagerIMethodRoute
Base route
selector
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManagerIResponseBuilderSelector
Defines an object that manages the type of response to send
defaultResultType (Optional)
Type: SystemType
Type of data object that will be sent to the client.

Return Value

Type: IMethodVerb

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethodRoute. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
